mapper.select: SELECT id, name, phone, address, description, is_deleted FROM merchant WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, phone, address, description, is_deleted FROM merchant WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant (name, phone, address, description, is_deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{description}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE merchant SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
